title: feat(voice-hume)
summary: Community contribution from Hume adding @mastra/voice-hume as a new voice provider. Includes TTS support via Hume Octave API and realtime voice via EVI (Empathic Voice Interface) WebSocket. Package structure follows existing voice provider conventions (voice/hume/ directory with standard tsup/vitest/eslint config). Includes unit tests, README, docs updates (overview, TTS page, reference page, sidebar), and a changeset. STT is not supported — users need CompositeVoice with another provider. 12 commits across the PR.
maintainerNotes: Well-structured community PR from the Hume team. LekoArts reviewed docs and left 4 inline comments (changeset formatting, remove pre.json change, remove auto-generated file, set version to 0.0.1) — all review threads are marked resolved. CodeRabbit flagged a potential null-deref in connect() error path and env var cleanup in tests — also resolved. No maintainer has reviewed the actual implementation code yet (LekoArts explicitly noted 'the code itself needs a check, too'). CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (Core, E2E, MCP, Memory, RAG tests never ran — likely needs maintainer authorization). Vercel deploy also requires team authorization. The pre.json modification adds @mastra/voice-hume at 0.12.0 which may need correction given LekoArts suggested version 0.0.1. Author is actively responsive and tagged maintainers for review.
